install: export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.2/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && (command -v uv >/dev/null || curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh) && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && uv sync --all-packages --extra aws && bash scripts/setup-matter-mcp.sh
start:
if [ -n "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" ] && [ -n "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" ] && [ -n "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_ROLE_ARN" ] && [ -n "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_EXTERNAL_ID" ]; then mkdir -p ~/.aws && printf '[cursor-bootstrap]
aws_access_key_id = %s
aws_secret_access_key = %s
' "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" > ~/.aws/credentials && chmod 600 ~/.aws/credentials && printf '[profile cursor-agent-infra]
role_arn = %s
source_profile = cursor-bootstrap
external_id = %s
region = us-east-1
' "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_ROLE_ARN" "$CURSOR_AGENT_AWS_EXTERNAL_ID" > ~/.aws/config; fi
